title: Sweets & Treats
description: A mod that adds various candies and other yummy foods.
body:
# Sweets & Treats
This mod will add loads of content based around popular sugary sweets. This mod is curretly in its beta and lots will come soon, so be ready.

## Cookies
This is a simple addition of the mod that adds and new way to make different cookies through crafting! Crafting a **Plain Cookie** from 2 wheat will open up all the cookie effects.
<details>
<summary>Cookies</summary>

- **Sugar Cookie** - A simple and yummy cookie.
- **Glow Berry Cookie** - A cookie that increases visability.
- **Sweet Berry Cookie** - A sweet cookie that inceases jump height.
- **Nether Wart Berry Cookie** - A strange cookie that gives strange after effects.
- **Spider Eye Berry Cookie** - A cookie with dangerous and helpful effects.


</details>
